name: polaris
description: Exposes Polaris CLI commands as Codex tools for running and managing taskchain clusters.

interface.shortDescription: Run and manage Polaris taskchain clusters
interface.longDescription: Provides polaris_run, polaris_loop_continue, and polaris_status tools backed by the local Polaris CLI. Use in Codex worker sessions to execute child tasks, advance the orchestration loop, and check cluster state — all without dumping large state files into context.
